_comment: Cross-language golden fixture for signing material (P102 W11 V04-F05). Asserts byte-identical output between Rust signing_material() in nclaw/core/src/sync/sign.rs and Go canonicalSigningMaterial() in plugins-pro/paid/nself-sync/cmd/nself-sync/main.go. The expected_material_hex field is the canonical 119-byte little-endian signing material; both sides MUST produce these exact bytes for the given envelope.
